creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #22)

Who can look into this? It's been years since I proposed a workaround:

> A quick-fix/workaround could be to change the new bug page
> to pass in "id":"1" (simply changing 'onclick="show_comment_preview()"'
> to 'onclick="show_comment_preview(1)"' might do the trick - I haven't
> tested this, but the javascript source of show_comment_preview
> indicates that this might work).

I detailed in comment #3 how I tested it using curl (where it worked, javascript change untested).

The combination of missing preview and missing edit functionality is suboptimal.
